posts.author: UrbanMunck (Michael Urban Munck)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When adding new views it is not possible to reorder the different views.
Would it be possible to reorder the different views that is added continuously to better maintain the overview.

What are you trying to achieve

I am trying to reorder or rearrange the different views on a item / product page.
